entry.title: New: Bill 184 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, CARRYOVER/SAVINGS, GENERAL FUND BY $5,000,000, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF PARKS AND RECREATION, COUNTYWIDE, INCREASE APPROPRIATION FOR COUNTYWIDE PARKS FACILITIES BY $1,200,000, PĀʻIA-HAʻIKŪ COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, ADD NEW APPROPRIATION FOR LOWER PAIA PARK PARKING LOT IN THE AMOUNT OF $300,000, WAILUKU-KAHULUl COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, ADD NEW APPROPRIATIONS FOR WAR MEMORIAL GYM BUILDING IMPROVEMENTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000,000, AND WAR MEMORIAL FOOTBALL STADIUM AND TRACK REHABILITATION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
